---
title: "NumericData"
author: "Mia Fitzgerald"
date: "3/24/2026"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
library(Lock5Data)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
data(StudentSurvey)

```

### Top 6 of New BMI Data


```{r}
student_health <- StudentSurvey %>%
  mutate(BMI = 701 * Weight/Height^2) %>%
  mutate(round(BMI, 1)) %>%
  select(Sex, Weight, Height, BMI)

student_health %>%
   head(6) %>%
  kable() 

```


^[Question 1 complete]
